content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission


September 17, 1991




Gary W. Peterson
Auditor-Controller/Treasurer
The County of Fresno
P. O. Box 1247
Fresno, CA  93715-1247

                                        Re:  Your Request for Advice
                                             Our File No. I-89-704

Dear Mr. Peterson:

     This letter confirms my telephone conversation of
September 16, 1991, with Mr. Dave Ciapponi of your office.
Mr. Ciappone advised me that you had agreed to withdraw your
request for advice, Our File No. I-89-704, regarding your filing
obligations under the provisions of Section 87200 of the Political
Reform Act (the "Act").1

     Staff is in the process of drafting regulations to implement
the term "other public officials who manage public investments" as
that term is used in Section 87200, as amended.  Your name has
been added to a list of persons who have expressed an interest in
this issue.  We will keep you informed of the progress of these
regulations.




_______________
1
     Government Code Sections 81000-91015.  All statutory references
are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.  Commission
regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section
18000, et seq.  All references to regulations are to Title 2,
Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.


428 J Street, Suite 800 ● P.O. Box 807 ● Sacramento CA 95804-0807 ● (916) 322-5660

Our File No. I-89-704
Page 2


Should you have any further questions regarding this matter,
do not hesitate to call me at (916) 322-5901.2

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

[signature]
By: Blanca M. Breeze
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:BNB:bb


2 Copies of Commission regulations and Opinions are available in
many law libraries. Alternatively, copies of these materials and
Commission advice letters may be obtained from the Commission at a
cost of 10¢ per page.

sections.question_synthetic: The requestor sought advice regarding filing obligations under Section 87200 of the Political Reform Act concerning public officials who manage public investments.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC confirms the withdrawal of the advice request. The Commission notes it is drafting regulations to implement the term "other public officials who manage public investments" and has added the requestor to a list of interested parties who will be kept informed of regulatory progress.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document is a withdrawal confirmation letter, not a standard Q&C advice letter. No verbatim QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections exist. The letter confirms a telephone conversation and withdrawal of File No. 1-89-704. Date discrepancy noted: document header shows 1989 but letter date is September 17, 1991.; Date cleared: parsed 1991-09-17 but file year is 1989

QUESTION: The requestor sought advice regarding filing obligations under Section 87200 of the Political Reform Act concerning public officials who manage public investments.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC confirms the withdrawal of the advice request. The Commission notes it is drafting regulations to implement the term "other public officials who manage public investments" and has added the requestor to a list of interested parties who will be kept informed of regulatory progress.

embedding.summary: This is a withdrawal letter from the FPPC confirming that Gary W. Peterson, Auditor-controller/Treasurer of Fresno County, has withdrawn his request for advice regarding Section 87200 filing obligations under the Political Reform Act.
